stories.title: Luas and traffic disruption in Dublin city centre after fire at pub
bullets: A fire at a pub in Dublin led to significant traffic disruptions, with Luas services affected and two individuals hospitalized.
Emergency services responded quickly, but only one lane of Eden Quay remains open, causing delays in the city center.
Authorities are investigating the cause of the fire, which may lead to safety reviews for public venues in Dublin.

stories.title: Taylor Swift files to trademark voice and image after AI concerns
bullets: Taylor Swift has filed for a trademark on her voice and image due to concerns over AI deepfakes, announced on April 28, 2026.
The trademark aims to protect her identity from unauthorized AI-generated content, reflecting growing fears in the entertainment industry.
This move could set a precedent for other artists seeking to safeguard their likenesses and voices against AI misuse.

stories.title: Smartphone sales are down, but Fairphone is having a breakout year
bullets: Fairphone reported a remarkable 116% growth in sales amid a declining smartphone market, as of April 28, 2026.
The company emphasizes sustainability, offering repairable and long-lasting devices, contrasting with the industry's focus on new models.
This success highlights a shift in consumer preferences towards environmentally friendly technology, challenging traditional smartphone manufacturers.

stories.title: More than half of Americans say their finances are getting worse
bullets: A Gallup poll conducted from April 1-15, 2026, revealed that 55% of Americans feel their financial situation is worsening.
This figure marks the highest level of financial distress reported in 25 years, exacerbated by rising inflation and gas prices due to the Iran war.
The findings pose a significant challenge for President Trump and Republicans ahead of the upcoming midterm elections.

stories.title: Pirate Piece Tier List – Best Sword, Ability, Fruit & More [UPD3]
bullets: An updated tier list for the game Pirate Piece was released on April 28, 2026, ranking swords, abilities, and fruits.
The guide includes strategies for both PVE and PVP, along with tips for farming resources effectively within the game.
This update aims to enhance player experience and competitiveness in the rapidly evolving gaming landscape.

stories.title: Foreign Office not consulted ahead of Mandelson appointment
bullets: The UK Foreign Office was not consulted prior to the appointment of Peter Mandelson, raising concerns about transparency in government.
A parliamentary vote is expected to follow, focusing on whether Labour leader Keir Starmer misled parliament regarding the appointment.
This situation could have significant implications for Starmer's leadership and the Labour Party's credibility moving forward.

stories.title: Johor police station attack: Father and brother of suspect get 30 years’ jail for terrorism-related offences
bullets: Two relatives of suspect Radin Luqman Radin Imran received 30-year prison sentences for terrorism-related offenses in Johor Bahru.
The attack on May 17, 2024, resulted in the deaths of two police officers, and the suspect was shot dead during the incident.
This sentencing underscores Malaysia's ongoing efforts to combat terrorism and hold accountable those associated with violent acts.
